item.title: Global shares are mostly lower as investors focus on the Iran war's impact on energy supplies
item.description: Global shares are mostly lower and oil prices have surged as investors eye threats to energy supplies from the Iran war

item.title: Oil prices surge as Strait of Hormuz tanker disruptions rattle global supply
item.description: Oil prices have jumped as tanker disruptions near the Strait of Hormuz raise fears about supply shortages from the Persian Gulf

item.title: Oil prices soar and stock prices fall as US-Israel war with Iran rattles markets
item.description: The U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran are roiling global markets, with U.S. futures falling about 1%

item.title: Travelers stranded as Middle East conflict spreads; governments scramble to bring citizens home
item.description: Governments are scrambling to bring citizens home after U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran shut down key Middle East flight routes

item.title: Malaysia renews Lynas Rare Earths' license for 10 years, orders end to radioactive waste by 2031
item.description: Malaysia has renewed Australian miner Lynas Rare Earths’ license for 10 years, but ordered it to stop producing radioactive waste by 2031
